hero.buyHeading: Find your ideal property to buy in Portugal
hero.buySubheading: Compare prices and features from thousands of properties for sale. Search by region, type, or price and find your dream home.
hero.rentHeading: Find your ideal property to rent in Portugal
hero.rentSubheading: Compare prices and features from thousands of rental properties. Search by region, type, or price and find your perfect home.

homepage.heading: Every listing. One search.
homepage.subheading: Predileto aggregates property listings from dozens of Portuguese real estate portals into a single search. Compare prices, locations, and features without jumping between websites.

banner.prototype: This website is a prototype — we're still building!

booking.agreementText: By scheduling this visit, you agree to our terms of service. The visit will be scheduled after your documents are verified. You will receive an email confirmation with the date and time of the visit. Your personal data will be processed in accordance with our privacy policy.
booking.agreementCheckbox: I have read and accept the terms and conditions
booking.nifRequired: NIF or passport number is required
booking.utilityBillDescription: Upload a recent proof of address
booking.dropzoneText: Drag files or click to select
booking.successMessage: You will receive an email confirmation shortly. We will contact you to confirm the date and time of the visit.

agencies.heading: Qualify applicants.
agencies.subheading: Predileto lets real estate agencies filter and manage applicants by verifying their income and documentation — all in one platform.
agencies.feature1Desc: Automatically validate applicant income receipts before scheduling visits.
agencies.feature2Desc: Receive and organize all applicant documentation in one secure place.
agencies.feature3Desc: Filter applicants by financial and document criteria to find the most qualified ones.
agencies.painEyebrow: The day-to-day you know too well
agencies.painHeading: Too much formatting. Too little closing.
agencies.painSubheading: Agencies lose hours every week to tasks a modern CRM should automate.
agencies.painPoint1Title: Every portal demands its own format.
agencies.painPoint1Body: Idealista, Imovirtual, Casa Sapo. Different rules, photos re-uploaded again and again.
agencies.painPoint2Title: Cold leads because screening is slow.
agencies.painPoint2Body: By the time you've checked income and documents, the candidate has already visited another property.
agencies.painPoint3Body: Recording, editing and captioning a video per property is impossible at the scale of a real team.
agencies.painPoint4Title: Data scattered across spreadsheets and inboxes.
agencies.painPoint4Body: Every agent has their own system. When someone leaves, the history leaves with them.
agencies.deepHeading: The complete CRM for modern real estate agencies.
agencies.deepSubheading: Tools that replace five different products — and finally talk to each other.
agencies.deep1Body: Drop in the photos. The AI generates titles, descriptions, attributes and SEO tags in seconds.
agencies.deep1Bullet1: Descriptions in PT, EN, FR, DE
agencies.deep2Body: Each candidate receives a short narrated video focused on what matters most to them.
agencies.deep3Body: Pay slips, contracts, tax forms — all verified and scored before the first visit.
agencies.deep4Body: Publish once, sync everywhere. Update the price in one place and it propagates on its own.
agencies.aiHeading: AI handles the repetitive work. You close the deal.
agencies.aiSubheading: Every Predileto AI feature is trained on Portuguese real-estate data — not a generic ChatGPT wrapper.
agencies.aiCap1Body: Fluent copy in four languages, with adjustable tone (formal, sales, premium).
agencies.aiCap2Body: Evaluates income, contract stability and history — in seconds.
agencies.aiCap3Body: Suggests answers to common property questions, ready to send.
agencies.aiCap4Body: Builds a personalized video for each candidate based on their preferences.
agencies.workflowHeading: From listing to close in four steps.
agencies.workflowStep1Body: Upload photos and floor plans. The AI generates the listing in under 30 seconds.
agencies.workflowStep2Body: One click syncs to Idealista, Imovirtual, Casa Sapo and the Predileto portal.
agencies.workflowStep3Body: Documents validated automatically. Only qualified candidates reach your calendar.
agencies.workflowStep4Body: Personalized video, scheduling, contract. All inside the same CRM.
agencies.testimonialsHeading: Teams that won back hours — and closed more deals.
agencies.testimonial1Quote: We cut listing creation time by 90%. What used to take a full morning is now instant.
agencies.testimonial2Quote: Automatic screening changed everything. My agents only meet serious candidates — the rest is filtered by the system.
agencies.testimonial3Quote: Personalized videos lifted our conversion rate by 40%. Clients feel like we're talking directly to them.
agencies.pricingSubheading: No lock-in. No surprises. Cancel anytime.
agencies.pricingTier1Desc: Perfect for agencies up to 5 agents.
agencies.pricingTier2Desc: For growing teams that want more automation.
agencies.pricingTier3Desc: For networks and franchises with specific needs.
agencies.faqHeading: Everything you need to know before getting started.
agencies.faq1A: Initial setup takes under 30 minutes. Our team imports your current listings and onboards your team in under a week.
agencies.faq2Q: Does it work with the portals I already use?
agencies.faq2A: Yes. We sync with Idealista, Imovirtual and Casa Sapo. More portal integrations are planned this year.
agencies.faq3A: Yes. EU-based servers, end-to-end encryption, and full GDPR compliance. You can export all your data at any time.
agencies.faq4Q: Do I need a credit card to start?
agencies.faq4A: No. You can start the Starter plan for free for 14 days. A credit card is only required when activating a paid plan.
agencies.faq5Q: What if my team isn't tech-savvy?
agencies.faq5A: It was designed for that. The interface is as simple as WhatsApp. We provide initial training and stay available for questions.
agencies.faq6A: Yes. No lock-in and no penalties. If you cancel, you keep access to your data in exportable format.
agencies.finalCtaHeading: Ready to free your team from repetitive work?
agencies.finalCtaSubheading: 30-minute setup. 14 days free. No credit card.

blog.heading: Blog
blog.subheading: Articles and guides about the real estate market in Portugal.

homeHero.heading: House hunting,
homeHero.subheading: Describe what you want in plain language. Our AI finds the right properties and shows the real cost of living in each — no rigid filters, no bouncing between dozens of sites.
homeHero.placeholderBuy: e.g. 2-bed apartment in Lisbon under €300,000 with a balcony...
homeHero.placeholderRent: e.g. 3-bed house in Porto under €1,500/month with a garden...

homeProblem.heading: House hunting in Portugal is exhausting.
homeProblem.subheading: Most sites treat you like a form. We don't.
homeProblem.pain1Title: Dozens of sites, the same listings.
homeProblem.pain1Body: Open Idealista, then Imovirtual, then Casa Sapo. Compare prices. Hope it's not a duplicate.
homeProblem.pain2Title: Rigid filters that never grasp what you want.
homeProblem.pain2Body: 'Under €300k, 2-bed, with a balcony, near a good school' doesn't fit in any dropdown.
homeProblem.pain3Title: The listing price isn't the real cost.
homeProblem.pain3Body: Property tax, condo fees, commute, energy. Nobody tells you — you find out too late.

homeHow.heading: How it works
homeHow.step1Body: Say what you're looking for like you would to an agent. The AI understands context and preferences.
homeHow.step2Body: Each result comes with cost of living, fuel, commute time, and noise level.
homeHow.step3Body: Anonymous comments from people who visited or lived in the area. No spin, no agents.

homeFeatures.heading: Everything in one place.
homeFeatures.subheading: No paid ads, no forced signup, no emails.
homeFeatures.feat1Body: Property tax, energy, transport — estimated per area.
homeFeatures.feat2Body: Lived there, loved or hated it. No identity, no bias.
homeFeatures.feat3Body: Describe in words, not in dropdowns.
homeFeatures.feat4Body: Search, save and compare. We ask nothing from you.
homeFeatures.feat5Body: Every search stays in your session.
homeFeatures.feat6Body: We monetize via agencies, never via users.
